description: Event parsing layer that converts raw EVM logs from forge script execution into structured treb domain events, including ABI bindings, proxy detection, natspec parsing, and library detection support

userStories.title: ABI Definitions via alloy sol! Macro
userStories.description: As a developer, I want type-safe ABI definitions for ITrebEvents, ICreateX, and ERC-1967 proxy events using alloy's sol! macro so that event decoding is compile-time verified against the Solidity interface
acceptanceCriteria: alloy-sol-types added to workspace deps and treb-forge/Cargo.toml

sol! macro compiles and generates types for all ITrebEvents events (TransactionSimulated, ContractDeployed, SafeTransactionQueued, SafeTransactionExecuted, DeploymentCollision, GovernorProposalCreated) with DeploymentDetails and SimulatedTransaction structs
sol! macro compiles and generates types for all ICreateX events (ContractCreation with salt, ContractCreation without salt, Create3ProxyContractCreation)
sol! macro compiles and generates types for ERC-1967 proxy events (Upgraded, AdminChanged, BeaconUpgraded)
events module created at crates/treb-forge/src/events/ with mod.rs and abi.rs, registered in lib.rs with re-exports
Unit test: construct each event type manually and verify field access
Typecheck passes (cargo check && cargo clippy)

userStories.title: Event Log Decoder
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a decoder that takes raw EVM Log entries and decodes them against known event signatures into typed Rust enums so that downstream consumers get structured event data
acceptanceCriteria: TrebEvent, CreateXEvent, ProxyEvent, and ParsedEvent enums defined with all variants matching the PRD specification in crates/treb-forge/src/events/decoder.rs
decode_events correctly decodes all ITrebEvents, ICreateX, and ERC-1967 proxy event types from raw logs using topic[0] signature matching
Unrecognized logs produce ParsedEvent::Unknown (not errors); malformed known events are logged as warnings and skipped
Proxy events include the emitting log address as proxy_address
Unit test: synthetic ContractDeployed logs decode with all fields matching known values
Unit test: mixed logs (treb + proxy + unknown) decode in emission order
Typecheck passes (cargo check && cargo clippy)

userStories.title: Deployment Extraction from Events
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to extract deployment information (address, deployer, strategy, salt, label) from decoded events so that downstream phases can create registry entries
acceptanceCriteria: ExtractedDeployment struct defined with all fields: address, deployer, transaction_id, contract_name, label, strategy, salt, bytecode_hash, init_code_hash, constructor_args, entropy, artifact_match
extract_deployments maps ContractDeployed events to ExtractedDeployment with all DeploymentDetails fields correctly populated
Strategy string parsing: 'create' -> Create, 'create2' -> Create2, 'create3' -> Create3, unknown defaults to Create
extract_collisions returns DeploymentCollision data from DeploymentCollision events
When ArtifactIndex is None, artifact_match is None without panicking
Unit tests: extract deployment with all fields verified, extract collision, unknown strategy defaults to Create
Typecheck passes (cargo check && cargo clippy)

userStories.title: Proxy Relationship Linking
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to detect proxy relationships from ERC-1967 events so that proxy-implementation pairs are correctly linked for deployment recording
acceptanceCriteria: ProxyType enum (Transparent, UUPS, Beacon, Minimal) and ProxyRelationship struct defined in crates/treb-forge/src/events/proxy.rs
Upgraded event alone results in UUPS proxy type; Upgraded + AdminChanged from same address results in Transparent
BeaconUpgraded event results in Beacon proxy type
Multiple proxies in the same execution are tracked independently by address in HashMap<Address, ProxyRelationship>
link_proxy_to_deployment matches proxy address to the corresponding ExtractedDeployment
Unit tests: single UUPS, TransparentUpgradeableProxy, Beacon proxy, multiple proxies in same execution
Typecheck passes (cargo check && cargo clippy)

userStories.title: Script Parameter / Natspec Parser
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to parse @custom:env natspec annotations from compiled script artifacts so that treb can discover what parameters a deployment script expects
acceptanceCriteria: foundry-linking added to workspace deps and treb-forge/Cargo.toml, re-exported from lib.rs

ParameterType enum with all 10 types (String, Address, Uint256, Int256, Bytes32, Bytes, Bool, Sender, Deployment, Artifact) and ScriptParameter struct defined in crates/treb-forge/src/events/params.rs
parse_script_parameters extracts parameters from devdoc JSON at methods.run().custom:env path
:optional suffix on type is parsed correctly to set optional=true
Missing devdoc or missing run() method returns empty vec (not error)
Unit tests: single param, optional param, multi-param string, empty devdoc
Typecheck passes (cargo check && cargo clippy)

userStories.title: Integration Tests with Captured Log Fixtures
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests that validate the full event parsing pipeline against realistic log fixtures so that the end-to-end flow from raw logs to structured deployment data is verified
acceptanceCriteria: At least 5 JSON fixture files created in crates/treb-forge/tests/fixtures/events/ (simple_deploy, create2_deploy, proxy_deploy, multi_deploy, collision) with hex-encoded log data matching alloy Log serialization
Integration test: simple deploy round-trip (raw logs -> decode -> extract deployment) succeeds with correct address and label
Integration test: CREATE2 deploy with salt correctly decoded with ContractCreation event
Integration test: proxy relationship detection identifies Transparent type with correct implementation and admin addresses
Integration test: full pipeline (decode -> extract deployments -> extract proxies -> link relationships) works end-to-end
All existing tests continue to pass (cargo test --workspace)
Typecheck passes (cargo check && cargo clippy)
